lyrics.text: Are you going to Scarborough Fair?
lyrics.translation: 你要去斯卡布罗集市吗？

lyrics.text: Parsley, sage, rosemary and thyme
lyrics.translation: 欧芹，鼠尾草，迷迭香和百里香

lyrics.text: Remember me to one who lives there
lyrics.translation: 请代我向住在那里的一个人问好

lyrics.text: He once was a true love of mine
lyrics.translation: 他曾经是我的真爱

lyrics.text: Tell him to make me a cambric shirt
lyrics.translation: 告诉他做件麻布衣衫

lyrics.text: Parsley, sage, rosemary and thyme
lyrics.translation: 欧芹，鼠尾草，迷迭香和百里香

lyrics.text: Without no seams nor needle work
lyrics.translation: 不要用针线，也找不到接缝

lyrics.text: Then he'll be a true love of mine
lyrics.translation: 然后，他会成为我的真爱

lyrics.text: Tell him to find me on acre of land
lyrics.translation: 告诉他为我找一亩地

lyrics.text: Parsley, sage, rosemary and thyme
lyrics.translation: 欧芹，鼠尾草，迷迭香和百里香

lyrics.text: Between the salt water and the sea strand
lyrics.translation: 就在海岸和大海之间

lyrics.text: Then he'll be a true love of mine
lyrics.translation: 然后，他会成为我的真爱

lyrics.text: Tell him to reap it with a sickle of leather
lyrics.translation: 告诉他用皮制的镰刀收割

lyrics.text: Parsley, sage, rosemary and thyme
lyrics.translation: 欧芹，鼠尾草，迷迭香和百里香

lyrics.text: And gather it all in a bunch of heather
lyrics.translation: 并收集在一起用石楠草扎成一束

lyrics.text: Then he'll be a true love of mine
lyrics.translation: 然后，他会成为我的真爱

lyrics.text: Are you going to Scarborough Fair?
lyrics.translation: 你要去斯卡布罗集市吗？

lyrics.text: Parsley, sage, rosemary and thyme
lyrics.translation: 欧芹，鼠尾草，迷迭香和百里香

lyrics.text: Remember me to one who lives there
lyrics.translation: 请代我向住在那里的一个人问好

lyrics.text: He once was a true love of mine
lyrics.translation: 他曾经是我的真爱……
